en: In those days John the Baptist came preaching in the wilderness of Judea,
zh: 那時，施洗的約翰出來，在猶太的曠野傳道，

en: "Repent, for the kingdom of heaven is at hand."
zh: 說：“天國近了，你們應當悔改。”

en: For this is he who was spoken of by the prophet Isaiah when he said, "The voice of one crying in the wilderness: Prepare the way of the Lord; make his paths straight."
zh: 以賽亞先知所說： “在曠野有呼喊者的聲音： ‘預備主的道， 修直他的路！’” 就是指著這約翰說的。

en: Now John wore a garment of camel's hair and a leather belt around his waist, and his food was locusts and wild honey.
zh: 約翰身穿駱駝毛的衣服，腰束皮帶，吃的是蝗蟲和野蜜。

en: Then Jerusalem and all Judea and all the region about the Jordan were going out to him,
zh: 耶路撒冷、猶太全地和約旦河一帶的人都出來到他那裡去，

en: and they were baptized by him in the river Jordan, confessing their sins.
zh: 承認自己的罪，在約旦河裡受了他的洗。

en: But when he saw many of the Pharisees and Sadducees coming for baptism, he said to them, "You brood of vipers! Who warned you to flee from the wrath to come?
zh: 約翰看見許多法利賽人和撒都該人來到他施洗的地方，就對他們說：“毒蛇所生的啊，誰指示你們逃避那將要來的忿怒呢？

en: Bear fruit in keeping with repentance.
zh: 應當結出果子來，與悔改的心相稱。

en: And do not presume to say to yourselves, 'We have Abraham as our father,' for I tell you, God is able from these stones to raise up children for Abraham.
zh: 你們心裡不要以為：‘我們有亞伯拉罕作我們的祖宗。’我告訴你們， 神能從這些石頭中給亞伯拉罕興起後裔來。

en: Even now the axe is laid to the root of the trees. Every tree therefore that does not bear good fruit is cut down and thrown into the fire.
zh: 現在斧頭已經放在樹根上，所有不結好果子的樹，就砍下來，丟在火裡。

en: "I baptize you with water for repentance, but he who is coming after me is mightier than I, whose sandals I am not worthy to carry. He will baptize you with the Holy Spirit and with fire.
zh: 我用水給你們施洗，表示你們悔改；但在我以後要來的那一位，能力比我更大，我就是替他提鞋也沒有資格。他要用聖靈與火給你們施洗。

en: His winnowing fork is in his hand, and he will clear his threshing floor and gather his wheat into the barn, but the chaff he will burn with unquenchable fire."
zh: 他手裡拿著簸箕，要揚淨麥場，把麥子收進倉裡，卻用不滅的火把糠秕燒盡。”

en: Then Jesus came from Galilee to the Jordan to John, to be baptized by him.
zh: 那時，耶穌從加利利來到約旦河約翰那裡，要受他的洗。

en: John would have prevented him, saying, "I need to be baptized by you, and do you come to me?"
zh: 約翰想要阻止他，說：“我應該受你的洗，你卻到我這裡來嗎？”

en: But Jesus answered him, "Let it be so now, for thus it is fitting for us to fulfill all righteousness." Then he consented.
zh: 耶穌回答：“暫且這樣作吧。我們理當這樣履行全部的義。”於是約翰答應了他。

en: And when Jesus was baptized, immediately he went up from the water, and behold, the heavens were opened to him, and he saw the Spirit of God descending like a dove and coming to rest on him;
zh: 耶穌受了洗，立刻從水中上來；忽然，天為他開了，他看見 神的靈，好像鴿子降下來，落在他身上；

en: and behold, a voice from heaven said, "This is my beloved Son, with whom I am well pleased."
zh: 又有聲音從天上來，說：“這是我的愛子，我所喜悅的。”
